profile.about: I'm a seasoned full-stack software engineer, specializing in PHP, JavaScript, GO and various other technologies. Leveraging extensive experience as a senior developer and team lead, my expertise lies in creating solutions that are not only tailored to client's immediate needs but also scalable and future-proof. I'm dedicated to effective collaboration, risk management, and building enduring systems.
